feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: A simple, whitespace theme for academics. Based on [*folio](https://github.com/bogoli/-folio) design.

entry.title: Wu-Tang is for the Children
entry.content: What happened to solidarity in hip hop?
entry.summary: What happened to solidarity in hip hop?

entry.title: Contextualizing Cryptography
entry.content: Cryptography research often feels disconnected from real-world impact because the field prioritizes abstract problem-solving over understanding societal effects. Explicitly discussing research goals could help align the field’s values with researchers’ actual motivations.
entry.summary: Cryptography research often feels disconnected from real-world impact because the field prioritizes abstract problem-solving over understanding societal effects. Explicitly discussing research goals could help align the field's values with researchers' actual motivations.

entry.title: Escaping Flatland - STEM vs. Humanities Training

link.title: Escaping Flatland - STEM vs. Humanities Training

entry.content: Traditional STEM education trains students to oversimplify complex problems. Humanities training is essential to help computer scientists perceive the full dimensions of the real-world social problems they are building technologies to address.
entry.summary: Traditional STEM education trains students to flatten complex problems so they can solve them. Humanities training, on the other hand, helps them perceive the full dimensions of the problems they are building for.

entry.title: Television as World Model Installation
entry.content: What if we could extract the world model that television installs in its viewers? Some thoughts on media, world models, cultivation theory, and culture.
entry.summary: What if we could extract the world model that television installs in its viewers?
